nasb.text: When Abraham’s servant heard their words, he bowed himself to the ground before the Lord.

esv.text: When Abraham’s servant heard their words, he bowed himself to the earth before the Lord.

cnv.text: 亞伯拉罕的僕人聽到了他們這些話，就俯伏在地敬拜耶和華。

ccb.text: 亚伯拉罕的仆人听见这话，就俯伏在地上敬拜耶和华，

csbs.text: 亚伯拉罕的仆人听见他们这话，就俯伏于地向耶和华下拜。
